name: Waffles (with Variations)(quick)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat egg yolks slightly.
3. Add milk and oil to the yolk mixture and beat until mixed.
4. Add the yolk mixture to the flour mixture all at once. Stir just until combined.
5. In a small bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the flour mixture.
7. Do not over mix!
8. Pour 1/2 cup of the batter into a preheated waffle maker and cook according to manufacturer's instructions.
9. When done, lift the waffle out with a fork.
10. Makes 5 or 6 waffles.
EASY WAFFLES: Prepare as above but do not separate eggs. In a bowl beat whole eggs slightly. Beat in milk and oil. Add to flour mixture and stir slightly.
CHOCOLATE WAFFLES: Prepare as above, but reduce flour to 1 1/2 cups and add 1/3 cup cocoa and 1/3 cup sugar to the flour mix. Add 1 tsp vanilla to the egg mix.
CINNAMON WAFFLES: Prepare as above but add 1/2 tsp cinnamon to the flour mixture.
BUTTERMILK WAFFLES: Prepare as above but substitute 2 cups buttermilk for regular milk.
NOTE: Bake for 2 1/2 minutes in a Betty Crocker waffle baker. There will still be a little steam, but the waffle will be done unless you prefer it to be very crisp.
